title: Silicone Piping Bags, 8 pcs Stainless Steel Nozzles Set with Coupler, 30cmx17cm-1 Reusable Icing Piping Bag with Cleaning Brush for Decorating Cakes, Pastries & Cupcakes (Pack of 11)
features: 🍰SAFE & EASY TO USE – This piping bag set is made with sustainable materials and features an anti-slip exterior for a firm grip, ensuring smooth cake decorations. It is lightweight, soft, flexible, easy to use, and comfortable to hold, making it an excellent baking kit for beginners.

🍰HIGH-QUALITY FLEXIBLE MATERIAL: Made from food-safe silicone, this piping bag with nozzles is leak-proof, tear-resistant and tasteless. Our corrosion-resistant stainless steel grommets and plastic coupling are perfect for long use

🍰CONVENIENT USE: Beautify your cake and save time with our non-slip and easy to use bag. Dishwasher safe and easy to assemble; Enjoy hassle-free changing of piping tips with a durable plastic coupling

🍰COMPLETE ICING KIT: It includes 1 large reusable piping bag (30cm x 17cm), perfect for large batches; 1 plastic coupler and 6 stainless steel cake decorating tips (2.8cm x 1.8cm) to show off your artistry

🍰MULTI-PURPOSE: Piping bags are ideal for hot or cold things, and the durable large piping tips are just as handy for filling pastries, icing, decorating, making swirls from mashed potatoes and much more
description: Product Description We bring you a premium quality piping bag with 6 different nozzles to let you decorate your desserts with multiple frosting patterns. You can use this piping bag for decorating cupcakes, frosting cakes, filling pastries and making swirls of whipped cream, cookie dough and much more. No matter if you’re a professional baker or a home chef, our piping bag is the best choice for you to enjoy mess-free baking. This piping bag, made from food-grade silicone infused plastic, is soft, leakproof and anti-slip. Throw DIY baking parties and impress your friends Enjoy mess-free baking with your family Decorate as many cupcakes as you want!
